cases.source: Source PDF audit emits anchors with parser-shaped whitespace such as Table\n9, Figure  1, and Appendix  A.

expected.reason: Whitespace and case differences must be canonicalized before anchor comparison.

cases.source: PyMuPDF source audit finds a required anchor that repaired output does not contain.

expected.reason: Independent source anchors missing from repaired output must gate final delivery.

cases.source: A missing source-PDF anchor must include page and snippet evidence for human recovery.
A required anchor is present in PyMuPDF source evidence but absent from MinerU inventory.

expected.reason: Recovered source-PDF snippets should remove hard G3P loss while forcing review instead of final.

cases.source: MinerU cloud v4 returns full_zip_url inside data.extract_result instead of inline pdf_info.

expected.reason: The API wrapper must expose ZIP URLs and optionally extract layout.json for pipeline input.

cases.source: An anchor missing before rendering should not be reported again as renderer loss.

expected.reason: Post-render audit validates anchors that reached repaired output, not all source anchors.

cases.source: MinerU table HTML appears in a repaired block.

expected.reason: Table markup must render as a table rather than escaped paragraph text.

cases.source: Auto-fix rules B1, D1, and E1 must not fire on safe negative examples.

expected.reason: Rules without negative safety coverage can silently rewrite valid content.

cases.source: Dominant Italian text, date/month text, body standard references, and parent-child headings should not create noisy review findings.

expected.reason: Review rules should identify risky parser defects, not normal standards-document structure.

cases.source: MinerU discarded header/footer blocks and common date/time/TOC number-word pairs should not pollute review output.

expected.reason: Safe header/footer blocks are provenance-discarded; E2 only reports genuinely suspicious units.
